title: Avatar
description: User avatar with image, initials fallback, status indicator and multiple sizes and shapes.

props.src: URL of the avatar image. Falls back to initials or icon if it fails.
props.initials: Initials shown when no image is available.
props.radius: Shape of the avatar. full=circle, none=square.
props.color: Background color when initials are shown.
props.status: Status indicator visible at the bottom corner.
props.bordered: Adds a border around the avatar.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when initials or the fallback icon are shown.
props.skeleton: Shows a loading placeholder with the same footprint.

image.title: Image
image.desc: Loads the image from a URL.

initials.title: Initials
initials.desc: Fallback with initials and semantic color when there is no image.

iconFallback.title: Icon fallback
iconFallback.desc: If there is no src or initials, a generic icon is shown.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Five scales: xs, small, medium, large and xl.

status.title: Status indicator
status.desc: Dot at the bottom-right corner to signal presence.
